raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint against American Express regarding a dispute I submitted for a charge of {$1800.00} USD from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX 

I canceled the contract within the XXXX window legally allowed under the terms. I also provided clear written proof that no services were rendered : no attendance, no check-in, and a unredeemed day pass certificate. Despite this, AMEX refused to categorize the transaction as unauthorized or invalid. 

The merchant is withholding {$1500.00} for services that were never used. I provided supporting documents to AMEX ( contract clause, unused certificate ), but they are ignoring this evidence and mishandling the dispute. 

I am asking the CFPB to investigate AMEXs handling of this dispute and their failure to protect me from a merchant misrepresentation and breach of contract.
